---
title: "Contributors"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: contributors
  type: grid
  fields: [title, description]
---

The NYC Open Data Lab is built through the work of student researchers and contributors who develop original analyses using public data and reproducible workflows.

Each contributor represents part of a growing, public-facing body of civic data research—transforming coursework into published, portfolio-ready work.

---

## A Community of Contributors

Contributors to the Lab:

- explore real-world questions about New York City  
- analyze publicly available datasets  
- develop reproducible research using R and Quarto  
- publish their work as part of the Lab’s ecosystem  

This model creates a collaborative environment where individual work contributes to a larger, evolving platform.

---

## Explore Contributors

Browse contributor profiles below to learn more about their work and projects.
